build: Build #24 — 429 Too Many Requests + JSON error + Retry-After header

ui_result.user_experience: Same degraded output as Build #23 (403). Gamma shows 1 empty card, theme selection, no error banner.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

diagnosis.conclusion: Build #24 (429 Too Many Requests) APF interception confirmed. Gamma frontend handles 429 the same as 403 and 422 — no special rate-limit retry logic triggered. Same 'Unable to complete request' error, same 1-card degraded output.
diagnosis.key_finding: All HTTP error codes (422, 403, 429) and even 200 with wrong content-type produce identical behavior in Gamma. The frontend catches all non-SSE responses as 'Unable to complete request' without any user-visible warning. Custom warning injection is mandatory.
diagnosis.recommendation: None of the standard HTTP error codes trigger user-visible warnings in Gamma. Must use either: (1) SSE text/event-stream with embedded warning text, or (2) JavaScript injection into page DOM.
